titleStmt.title: SII 6.575: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 575. (A.R. No. 139 of 1899). ON ANOTHER SLAB IN AN ENCLOSURE NEAR THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[©] svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramē[©]
śvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī
mattraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijeyarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhiprava¨rddha
mānamācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . ta
tputraṁ . svasti sa¨rvvalōkāśrayaṁ samastabhudhajanāśrayaṁ Āhavamalla
dēvanaṁkakāṟa paramaṇḍaḷasūṟekāṟa kaṭakaprākāraṁ vani janādhāraṁ vairima
dama¨rddana pratāpajanā¨rḻdananacaḷitavākya cāḷukyamāṇikya śrīkēḷīsada
nanabhinavamadana vipakṣakuḷakāḷadaṇḍa vīramā¨rttaṇḍa ripurāyahrida
yasella sāhasamalla dīnānāthaciṁtāmaṇi maṇḍaḷikamakuṭacūḍāma
ṇi vēṁgīmaṇḍaḷēśvaranayyanadaṇḍa śrīviṣṇuva¨rḻdhanamahārāja vijayādityadēvaru
noḷaṁbavāḍimūvatti¨rccāsiramuma sukhasaṁkhathāvinōdadiṁdāḻdurājyaṁ
geyyuttamire . sakava¨rṣa 986 neya krōdhi saṁvatsarada caitrada pu
ṇname Ādityavārada vanadapa¨rvvanimitta(ṁ)diṁ sūḷevāḷa māramayya
śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ bijjaladēva[¨r]gge binnapaṁgeydu mārēśva
radēva¨rgge Uccaṁgiya(ṁ) kōṭeya nairityada deseya paḍavaḷageṟeya
keḷagaṇa gaḻdeya ni¨rmmaṇnane tōṁṭa nityamaṁ kōṭeyalaṟuvattekkaṭi
garuṁ nakharamuṁ paṁcamaṭhasthānamaṟiyallu svasti yamaniyamasvā
dhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭāṇajapasamādhisīlaṣaḍaṁgō
pahārādisaṁpannarappa śrīmatu khaḷēśvarapaṇḍitara kālaṁ ka¨rcci dhā
rāpū¨rvvakaṁmāḍi sa¨rvvanamasyamāge biṭṭukoṭṭaru . Ī keṟeya bhū
mi dēva[¨r]gge yondu bhāgamuṁ maṭhakke yaraḍu bhāgamuṁ naḍasu
varu . Ī dha¨rmmamanāro¨rvvaru pratipāḷisida¨rgge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētra
prayāge A¨rgghyatī¨rtthaṁgaḷoḷu sāsirakavileya kōḍuṁ ko
ḷagumaṁ ponnalu kaṭṭisi sāsi¨rvvaru vēdapāragarappa brā
hmaṇa¨rgge dānaṁgeyda phaḷamakku . Ī dha¨rmmamanaḷidava¨rgge Ā tī¨rttha
dalu Ā sāsirakavileyumaṁ sāsi¨rvvaru brā(ṁ)hmaṇarumaṁ
sāsiraliṁgamumaṁ naḷida paṁcamahāpātakanaku . svada
ttaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasu(ṁ)ndharā[ṁ .*] ṣaṣṭi¨rvvariṣasahasrā
ṇi miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi ... sāmānyōyaṁ dha¨rmmasētu
¨rnripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sa¨rvvānētān(.)bhā
ginaḥ pā¨rtthivēṁdrō bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāma
caṁdraḥ . Aḷidavanidanekkōṭiyanaḷidaṁ tī¨rtthaṁgaḷatu
maniṁtuṁ manōraṁtaḷidaṁ pasuvaṁ pāruvaraṁ naḷida
mmeyyōdida nātana japajjigīḷidaṁ . 6 siriya
svasti cittarima
caṁnaina sikrita
Digital edition of SII 6.575 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
